---
title: "Transcutaneous vagus nerve stimulation via tragus or cymba conchae: Are its psychophysiological effects dependent on the stimulation area?"

pub-authors:
  - Borges
  - Pfannenstiel
  - Tsukahara
  - Laborde
  - Klatt
  - Raab

pub-year: "2021"
date: "2021-01-01"
venue: "International Journal of Psychophysiology"
pub-type: "Journal Article"
pub-status: "Published"

categories:
  - pupillometry
  - measurement

pdf: "/publications/2021-ijp-vagus-pupil/2021-ijp-vagus-pupil.pdf"
data: ""
code: ""
doi: "10.1016/j.ijpsycho.2021.01.003"

project:
  - ac-brain

listing-page: false
format: html
---
